'''Mana Veridi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Mana Veridi was discovered by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] near birth and [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. After constructing her own [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and passing the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]], Veridi was elevated to the rank of Jedi Knight by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. Accepting missions from the august body, Veridi was assigned to investigate a disturbance on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] world of [[Kwannot]].<ref name="OB" />

[[File:ManaVeridiDeath.jpg|thumb|left|Mana Veridi is killed by [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]].]]

While on Kwannot, Veridi felt that the situation had become significantly more dangerous than expected and sent a [[Jedi beacon/Legends|distress call]] to Coruscant. Upon receiving the emergency code, the High Council tasked [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], to locate Veridi and complete her mission. Homing in on her distress beacon, the Jedi located Veridi hiding amidst the shadows of one of the planet's cities. Recognizing the Jedi, Veridi sighed with relief and began to brief them on her situation. However, before she could begin, the [[Jedi hunter/Legends|Jedi hunter]] [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] ignited her lightsaber and [[Shiak|impaled]] Veridi in the chest, killing her. Sing confiscated Veridi's lightsaber and [[Duel on Kwannot|engaged]] the Jedi, who were able to drive her off but not capture her.<ref name="OB" />

===Legacy===
Over three decades after her death, exiled Master Obi-Wan Kenobi told [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] her story as they journeyed to [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] aboard the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="OB" />
